rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.28+commit.7893614a"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"NotGovernance","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"SystemPaused","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"ZeroGovernance","type":"error"},{"inputs":[],"name":"governance","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"paused","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"GovernanceManaged","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"governance()":{"notice":"The Governance multisig + timelock contract that owns         admin authority over this contract."},"paused()":{"notice":"Read the global pause flag."}},"notice":"Base contract that gates admin functions behind a single         `Governance` multisig + timelock, and exposes a pause hook so         downstream writes can be killed system-wide in an incident.         Spec 007 Phase A.5 (SC4 \u00a7 4.2). The `governance` address is         immutable per deploy \u2014 to \"upgrade\" governance for a contract,         you redeploy the contract pointing at the new governance.         Governance itself is non-upgradeable.         Inheritors gain:           - `onlyGovernance` modifier for setters / admin functions.           - `whenNotPaused` modifier for write-surface functions that             should freeze during an incident.           - A pause-aware view (`paused()`) for off-chain tooling.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/governance/GovernanceManaged.sol":"GovernanceManaged"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/governance/GovernanceManaged.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7cdd7e315e0123e5779b800d34571ad3a2212d06eaae2229fe100b0430bc39ca","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2790b4c81886582de27241d693d58d604984b7f947367e2aea01ee3cf74c63d9","dweb:/ipfs/QmNqKQFtBtdw9uTWnK1GN9eoD2V5KEnDJ5o5AjYpUCG6BN"]},"src/governance/IGovernance.sol":{"keccak256":"0x67bcb60323d5947a3f25259f02ffc345b1b11592d987a4b82c16e9af27a14bba","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e7cd17780618ab892a9c72e54ec74ce44f5c9fd4d742b2485802eea44dd90d9b","dweb:/ipfs/QmVPfwq93jgJv1YvhLLkbBHAdSkAEk7DznYUrA6EEHYyMR"]}},"version":1}
